code:
import io
import string

fn factorial(_ n: Int) -> Int
  match n
  when 0
    1
  when _
    n * factorial(n - 1)
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(n)
      let r = factorial(n)
      println("#{n}!=#{r}")
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
